steps.title: Describe a sufficient sample
steps.content: The passage contrasts ratings based on only a few users with a rating based on more than 9,000 users. The blank must describe a number large enough to make the average rating feel reliable.

steps.title: Reject wrong sample descriptions
steps.content: Choice A means not enough, which contradicts the confidence described. Choice B means too much, but the passage does not criticize the number as excessive. Choice C describes correctness, not whether a count of raters is sufficient. The answer is D.
